templates.ARRIVED_WORKING: Hi! I’ve arrived at the restaurant and they’re working on your order. I’ll be on my way shortly.
templates.ARRIVED_FEW_MINUTES: Hi! I’ve arrived at the restaurant and they’re still finishing up your order. It may take a few extra minutes, but I’ll head your way as soon as it’s ready 🚗
templates.STOPS_ONE_HOTBAG: Hi! I’m at the restaurant now waiting on your order. I have one quick stop before heading straight to you, and I’ll keep your food in a hot bag! 🔥
templates.STOPS_ONE_NOHOTBAG: Hi! I’m at the restaurant now waiting on your order. I have one quick stop before heading straight to you.
templates.STOPS_COUPLE_HOTBAG: Hi! I’m at the restaurant now waiting on your order. I have a couple quick stops before heading straight to you, and I’ll keep your food in a hot bag! 🔥
templates.STOPS_COUPLE_NOHOTBAG: Hi! I’m at the restaurant now waiting on your order. I have a couple quick stops before heading straight to you.
templates.HEADING_WITH_ETA: Heading your way now. ETA around {ETA}.
templates.TRAFFIC_DELAY: Just a heads up — I’ve hit some traffic, but I’m on the way.
templates.SHOP_SINGLE: Hi! I’m at {STORE} getting started on your order 🛒 Please keep your phone nearby in case I need to check on a substitution.
templates.SHOP_MULTIPLE: Hi! I’m at {STORE} getting started on your order 🛒 I’m shopping a couple orders right now. Please keep your phone nearby in case I need to check on a substitution.
templates.NO_RESPONSE_REPLACE: I haven’t heard back, so I’ll replace any missing item(s) with a close substitute.
templates.DELIVERED_FOOD: Your order has been delivered. Enjoy! 🍽️
templates.DELIVERED_SHOP: Your order has been delivered. Thank you!
templates.THANKS: Thank you for your order! Have a great rest of your day!
